# Distribution Loop Checklist Template

## Morning Block

- [ ] post published
- [ ] comments replied within SLA
- [ ] inbound DMs handled
- [ ] 5-10 ICP post engagements completed

## Signal Capture

- [ ] commenters logged
- [ ] profile visitors logged
- [ ] high-signal contacts routed

## Evening Block

- [ ] second ICP engagement pass completed
- [ ] DM follow-ups sent
- [ ] swipe file updated with winning patterns

## Daily Metrics

- impressions:
- comments:
- DMs started:
- qualified conversations:
